scope: derived.status free-text and em-dash leak in graph-metadata.json
summary: Not solved. The normalizer returns arbitrary normalized strings for unknown statuses and the schema accepts any non-empty string, so prose with em-dashes becomes a valid status. Confirmed against live files.

title: Close the status type at the schema boundary
problem: normalizeDerivedStatus maps known statuses but returns normalized for every unknown value, so prose becomes a valid status. The Zod schema accepts any non-empty string for derived.status.
evidence: normalizeDerivedStatus graph-metadata-parser.ts:158-181 default returns normalized, graphMetadataDerivedSchema graph-metadata-schema.ts:40-45
proposal: Add a shared GRAPH_METADATA_STATUS_VALUES const, export GraphMetadataStatus, change derived.status to z.enum, and make normalizeDerivedStatus return only those values or null.

title: Map rich lifecycle prose to the closed enum
problem: The parser reads free-text status from frontmatter and the spec.md metadata table and normalizes it straight into status. Live files carry em-dash prose statuses.
proposal: Treat rich states as detail, not enum values. Prefix wins. Map draft, placeholder, blocked, pending, scaffolded to planned. Map standalone no_go to complete, shadow_only and benchmark_gated to in_progress. Preserve nuance in the doc body.

title: Stop preserving legacy bad statuses on re-derive
problem: If a packet has no implementation-summary.md, deriveStatus preserves existing.derived.status after normalization. Because the normalizer returns arbitrary unknown strings, old rich statuses carry forward indefinitely.
proposal: Only preserve existingStatus when it is already one of the closed enum values. Otherwise re-derive from docs or fall back to planned plus a review flag.

title: Add validator and test coverage for the enum contract
problem: GRAPH_METADATA_SHAPE only checks that status or last_known_status exists, not that it is valid. Tests currently assert non-enum statuses survive.
evidence: check-graph-metadata-shape.sh:58-64, graph-metadata-schema.vitest.ts:333-360 and :363-385, status flattened into searchable text graph-metadata-parser.ts:1311-1317
proposal: Update GRAPH_METADATA_SHAPE to warn or fail on out-of-enum statuses, update tests to assert prose maps to the closed enum, model the vocabulary like gate-3-classifier.ts:24-28. Start as warning, then promote after scoped migration.
